# Name: # OTA-capable layout on 4 MB flash. Two equal app slots (ota_0/ota_1)
# of 1280 KB each — enough headroom for the current ~1 MB binary plus
# TLS/SIP/HTTP/OTA code. otadata picks the active slot
# writes to the inactive one. Storage partition keeps the "storage"
# label so announcement.c continues to mount it unchanged.
# One-way migration: existing dongles running the old factory-only
# layout must be reflashed over USB once. From there on
# flip between ota_0 and ota_1 automatically.
